ValidationRule.description: SAL26-1450 - Oppty Solution Can Not Be Edited After Stage 7
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_Opportunity_Solution_Validation__c), OR( ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.StageName, "7 Closed Won"), ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.StageName, "7 Closed Lost"), ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.StageName, "7 Closed Admin"), NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.Opportunity_Sub_Type__c, "MSP"), ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.Opportunity_Sub_Type__c, "MSP Overage"), ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.Opportunity_Sub_Type__c, "MSP Consumption Renewal"), ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.Opportunity_Sub_Type__c, "GC Offer")) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Opportunity Solution Details cannot be created or edited when the Opportunity is in Stage 7 or has a Non-MSP / GC Offer Sub Type.
